login.title: Takulandirani
login.subtitle: Lowani kuti mupitilize pa
login.offline_notice: Muli ofulaini panopa. Mutha kulowa ngati munalowa m'mbuyomu pa chipangizo ichi.

settings.title: Zosintha za Sisitimu
settings.offline_notice: Zosintha zasungidwa ofulaini ndipo zitumizidwa mukakhala pa intaneti.

landing.hero_desc: Takulandirani ku tsamba lovomerezeka la gulu lathu. Timathandizira kusonkhanitsa ndalama pamodzi, kupereka ngongole za chiwongolero chochepa, komanso kuunika ndalama motetezeka pogwiritsa ntchito dongosolo loyang'aniridwa ndi anthu awiri.
landing.about_desc: Kupangidwa kuti kukulitse kayendetsedwe kabwino, kufulumizitsa chitukuko, ndikutsatira malamulo apamwamba a zachuma.
landing.workflow_desc: Kugawika kwathunthu kwa mphamvu pakati pa Alembi omwe amalembetsa zochitika, ndi Asungichuma omwe amavomereza ndikutsimikizira malipiro.
landing.interest_desc: Njira yathu yatsopano imawerengera chiwongolero cha ngongole kutengera magawo omwe membala wasunga m'malo mwa ngongole yomwe watenga.
landing.gateways_desc: Magawo anayi a ogwiritsa ntchito (Admin, Treasurer, Secretary, Member) kuwonetsetsa kuti aliyense ali ndi malo ake otetezeka komanso osasokonezana.
landing.sec_stor_priv_title: Chitetezo, Kasungidwe ndi Chinsinsi cha Deta
landing.security_desc: TEBAMS imagwiritsa ntchito njira zachitetezo zapamwamba kwambiri. Mapasitala onse ogwiritsa ntchito amasungidwa mwachinsinsi (bcrypt), njira zonse zolowera zili ndi chitetezo champhamvu, ndipo palibe membala m'modzi yemwe angasinthe ndalama popanda anthu awiri kuvomereza.
landing.storage_desc: Mbiri yanu ya zachuma imasungidwa mu PostgreSQL database yapakati yokhala ndi chitetezo cha TLS pipeline. Ndiponso, mukakhala offline, zochitika zanu zimasungidwa motetezeka mu chipangizo chanu cha IndexedDB sandbox.
landing.privacy_desc: Timasunga chinsinsi chokhwima cha aliyense. Mbiri ya zachuma imapezeka kwa membala mwiniwake, Mlembi ndi Msungichuma ovomerezeka okha. Kufufuza kulikonse kwa deta kumatsegula chipika chosasinthika m'dongosolo lathu la Audit Trail.
landing.faq_title: Muli ndi Mafunso? Tili ndi Mayankho
landing.faq_q1: Kodi Teachers Bank Management System (TEBAMS) ndi chiyani?
landing.faq_a1: TEBAMS ndi nsanja yotetezeka yotsimikizira zachuma yomwe idapangidwira makamaka kuyang'anira zosonkhanitsa za mamembala, ndalama zadzidzidzi, komanso ngongole za gulu. Imateteza kuwonekera komanso udindo mwachilungamo.
landing.faq_q2: Kodi dongosolo la anthu awiri limagwira bwanji ntchito?
landing.faq_a2: Kuti chuma chitetezeke, TEBAMS imagwiritsa ntchito anthu awiri. Mlembi amalembetsa mamembala ndi zochitika zonse (zosonkhanitsa, zobweza, ngongole) monga ZODIKIRA. Msungichuma kenako amaunika ndikuvomereza kapena kukana.
landing.faq_q3: Kodi chiwongolero cha ngongole chimawerengedwa bwanji?
landing.faq_a3: Kusiyana ndi mabanki wamba komwe chiwongolero chimatengera ndalama zomwe wabwereka, TEBAMS imawerengera chiwongolero kutengera magawo omwe wasunga kale. Izi zimalimbikitsa kusunga ndalama kuposa kutenga ngongole.
landing.faq_q4: Kodi mamembala wamba ali ndi ufulu wotani pa sisitimuyi?
landing.faq_a4: Mamembala wamba amapatsidwa makiyi achinsinsi kuti athe kulowa ndi kuona mbiri yawo yonse ya chuma, kuphatikizapo magawo awo, ngongole, zobweza, ndi malisiti awo.
landing.faq_q5: Kodi sisitimuyi imagwira ntchito popanda intaneti?
landing.faq_a5: Eya! TEBAMS idapangidwa kuti izigwira ntchito ngakhale mulibe intaneti (PWA). Mutha kulembetsa mamembala, kulowetsa zosonkhanitsa popanda intaneti. Zochitika zanu zonse zimasungidwa mu IndexedDB ya chipangizo chanu ndipo zizitumizidwa pa intaneti yokha ngati intaneti yabwerako.
landing.faq_q6: Kodi deta yanga ya chuma ili yotetezeka bwanji?
landing.faq_a6: TEBAMS imagwiritsa ntchito chitetezo chokhwima komanso ma passwords otetezedwa kwambiri. Koposa zonse, dongosolo loyang'anira la anthu awiri limateteza kuti pasakhale munthu m'modzi yemwe angalembe ndi kuvomereza zochitika yekha, kupeweratu zachinyengo m'gululi.
landing.faq_q7: Ndani ali oyenerera kugwiritsa ntchito sisitimuyi?
landing.faq_a7: TEBAMS idapangidwa kuti izigwira ntchito ngakhale mulibe intaneti (PWA). Mutha kulembetsa mamembala, kulowetsa zosonkhanitsa popanda intaneti. Zochitika zanu zonse zimasungidwa mu IndexedDB ya chipangizo chanu ndipo zizitumizidwa pa intaneti yokha ngati intaneti yabwerako.
landing.faq_q8: Kodi dongosolo la kayendetsedwe ka ntchito lili bwanji pa udindo uliwonse?
landing.faq_a8: Kagwiritsidwe ntchito katengera udindo wanu: 1) Admin amasintha zofunika za gulu ndikuyang'anira ogwiritsa ntchito ena. 2) Mlembi (Secretary) amalembetsa mamembala, kulemba zosonkhanitsa ndiponso ngongole monga zodikira (pending). 3) Msungichuma (Treasurer) amapenda ndikuvomereza ngongole kapena ndalama zolowa. 4) Membala amaona magawo ake, ngongole zake, komanso kutsitsa malisiti a chuma chake.
